task: Build a multi-model conductor for unattended coding on a Mac mini.
assumptions: Git is available and repo has a base branch called main.

must: All model outputs validate against JSON schemas
Builder changes are isolated in git branches/worktrees
should: Tournament mode available when stuck or ambiguous
Artifacts saved with redaction before model prompts

milestones.title: Scaffolding
milestones.goal: Create run folders, state tracking, and git worktrees.

milestones.title: Proposal + synthesis
milestones.goal: Implement Phase 1 and 2 JSON validation + outputs.

risk_flags: Prevent secrets from entering model prompts via redaction.
